title: harrisonia abyssinica subsp. occidentalis
intro: Harrisonia abyssinica subsp. occidentalis, also known as the African alstonia, is a plant species belonging to the family Simaroubaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antipyretic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Harrisonia abyssinica subsp. occidentalis include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating malaria and other infectious diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, roots, and leaves can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
